title: @everyone
text:
@everyone 
ЁЯУг GTA Lorcana тАФEvent Announcement

тЭДя╕П Season Championship тАФ Open to Everyone
We're approaching the end of the Winterspell season, and this time we're opening the End of Set Championship to the full community instead of limiting it to our top 32. It's a new direction for us, and we're looking forward to seeing how it goes.

ЁЯУЖ Event Details
Date: May 2, 2026 тАФ 11:00 AM
Venue: Enter The Battlefield Oakville, 2172 Speers Rd, Oakville, ON
Format: Core Constructed | Swiss + Top 8 Cut | $2,000 Guaranteed

ЁЯТ╡ Entry & Prizing
Entry is $50 + tax, with prizing in store credit. Top 8 pays out $100тАУ$800.
Leaderboard players (Top 32) pay in-store on the day and earn $0.50 off per season point.

ЁЯОЯя╕П Registration
https://enterthebattlefield.ca/collections/events/products/gta-lorcana-league-winterspell-season-championship-may-2nd

ЁЯзСтАНЁЯдЭтАНЁЯзС Spread the Word
Winterspell Season Championship is open to the full community this season тАФ feel free to share this post with anyone who might be interested.

Questions or feedback? Drop them in <#1346159732490240020>.
author: GTA Lorcana

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone
ЁЯУг GTA Lorcana тАФ Server Update

A few things to share:

ЁЯОЯя╕П ETB Lorcana Infinity $15K CCQ
Registration is open for the Enter the Battlefield CCQ on May 30th to 31st тАФ 256 players, $15,000 in prizes. If you haven't signed up yet, now's the time:
https://www.eventbrite.ca/e/enter-the-battlefield-lorcana-infinity-15k-ccq-tickets-1980757254268

ЁЯЫТ ETB Community Discount тАФ Now Automated
The Google Form is gone. You can now apply for the Enter the Battlefield community discount directly in Discord:
/etb-discount rph_username:YourUsername email:you@example.com
See <#1255205802944233483> for eligibility and instructions.
If you were previously approved via the form, run the command anyway to confirm your account is linked тАФ it'll let you know if you're already good to go.

ЁЯПЖ Set Championships
Set Champs are now posted automatically in <#1422319248218525727> тАФ updated daily at 7:00 AM ET. Events run April 4тАУ26. No more Google Sheets.

ЁЯУК Community Poll
The admin team is still going through the poll results from earlier this month тАФ we haven't forgotten. More to come.  Season end date and invitational date to be confirmed.

Questions or feedback? Drop them in <#1346159732490240020>.
author: GTA Lorcana

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone 

ЁЯУг GTA Lorcana тАФ Server Update

A few things have been cooking behind the scenes. Here's what's new:

ЁЯМР Website Rework
Fully rebuilt тАФ cleaner, faster, more useful. Check it out at [gtalorcana.ca](https://gtalorcana.ca/) and share with people in your community!

тнР Roles
We now have a rarity-based role system reflecting your league achievements, assigned automatically based on your results. See <#1483899917616550080> for the full breakdown and to make sure your account is linked correctly.

ЁЯдЦ Bot Updates
The GTA Lorcana Bot has been running quietly тАФ here's what it actually does:
<#1479988278164852746> тАФ automatically updated with active local stores and stores that need our support
<#1253943193519784028> тАФ standings pulled and logged automatically after events
<#1422319248218525727> тАФ auto-populated starting two weeks before set champs season
<#1481489441746059395> (beta) тАФ monitors events for open spots. Get notified when space opens up in a watched event (yes, this means you, Montreal CCQ)
Full automation means less room for manual corrections тАФ results should be submitted correctly at your local store. If something looks wrong, message Ryan.

ЁЯТЬ Server Boosts
We're at Level 1. Five more boosts gets us to Level 2, which would unlock custom role icons тАФ the actual Lorcana rarity symbols on your roles. I already contribute 2 boosts myself. If you've been thinking about it, now's a great time.

ЁЯТм Feedback
Have ideas? City roles? Something broken? Something you'd like to see? Drop it in <#1346159732490240020> or use the anonymous form linked there.
author: GTA Lorcana
